profile.name: Ed Hoogasian
profile.headline: Senior Analytics & AI Strategy Leader
profile.summary: Analytics and AI strategy leader with 8+ years building KPI systems, scalable reporting/data products, GTM/customer intelligence, market intelligence, executive reporting, and AI-enabled workflow automation. Strong at translating ambiguous business problems into reliable data foundations, dashboards, operating rhythms, and productized workflows that leaders and frontline teams adopt.
differentiators: Hybrid analytics + product/operator profile: can frame messy problems, build the solution, validate it, roll it out, and explain it to executives.

Proven business impact: $5.5M+ ARR impact from ICP/segmentation work, 2,000+ hours reclaimed through automation, 15%+ conversion improvement from qualification/outreach guidance, and 30-50% operational coordination reduction in supply chain planning contexts.
Company-name integrity: canonical experience keeps Mimecast, Rapid7, Latch, CyberArk, and CocoChew rather than anonymized source variants.
AI implementation credibility: prompt frameworks, LLM workflows, agentic patterns, contextual memory, eval/guardrails, structured extraction, document workflows, and client-facing portals.
profile.personalNotes: Proud girl dad; unprofessional golfer; professional dog lover; movie nerd; enjoys good beer and whiskey.

highlights.title: ICP redefinition that moved ARR
highlights.context: Redefined the Ideal Customer Profile using CRM, ERP, third-party firmographic data, and qualitative inputs from marketing, sales, product, and customer success; downstream targeting/outreach drove $5.5M+ net-new ARR improvement.
highlights.problem: Targeting needed a stronger evidence-backed Ideal Customer Profile across multiple segments.
highlights.approach: Combined CRM/ERP data, third-party firmographics, and qualitative signals from marketing, sales, product, and CS; defined segmentation and outreach guidance.
highlights.outcome: Retargeting and outreach campaigns produced $5.5M+ net-new ARR improvement.

highlights.title: Manual workflow automation at scale
highlights.context: Identified and automated manual workflows and optimized data pipelines, reclaiming 2,000+ off-clock work hours and improving trust in pipeline/bookings reporting.
highlights.problem: Manual workflows and an unreliable pipeline/bookings dataset consumed time and eroded trust.
highlights.approach: Automated manual processes, optimized data pipelines, refactored business logic, and improved usability/reliability for downstream reporting.
highlights.outcome: Reclaimed 2,000+ off-clock hours and increased trust in core data assets.

highlights.title: Conversion lift via prospect qualification
highlights.context: Improved conversion rates 15%+ by defining ideal prospect qualifications and delivering time-sensitive outreach guidance based on internal/external data and anecdotal evidence.
highlights.problem: Outbound and follow-up effort wasn't matched to where it would actually convert — qualification was inconsistent and time-sensitive signals were getting missed.
highlights.approach: Defined ideal prospect qualifications using internal/external data and anecdotal field input, then translated that into time-sensitive outreach guidance the front-line team could act on the same week.
highlights.outcome: Conversion rates improved 15%+ and the qualification framework became reusable across new segments and campaigns.

highlights.title: Exec-to-IC reporting cadence
highlights.context: Built KPI framework and automated Tableau reporting for annual partner-program initiatives, consumed daily/weekly from executive board/EXCO to individual contributors.
highlights.roleTitle: Senior Strategic Analyst, WW Partner Programs
highlights.problem: An annual partner-program initiative needed a single set of numbers everyone — from the executive board down to individual contributors — could trust and read on the same cadence.
highlights.approach: Designed the KPI framework end-to-end and built automated Tableau reporting layered for each audience: board-level rollups, exec views, manager dashboards, and IC-level drilldowns.
highlights.outcome: One reporting system became the operating rhythm for daily and weekly reviews across the org, replacing fragmented PowerPoints and ad-hoc pulls.

highlights.metric: thousands of managed services partners globally
highlights.title: Global MSP transition tracking
highlights.context: Created end-to-end tracking for a global MSP transition program, integrating DocuSign, Salesforce, DWH, and certification data into pipelines/dashboards with accuracy criteria and automated cadence reports.
highlights.roleTitle: Senior Strategic Analyst, WW Partner Programs
highlights.problem: Global partner-program revamp required reliable tracking of agreements, certification data, and transition progress across thousands of managed services partners.
highlights.approach: Integrated DocuSign, Salesforce, DWH, and certification data; defined KPI framework and accuracy criteria; built Tableau dashboards and automated cadence reports.
highlights.outcome: Leadership could monitor adoption, risk, and completion for a high-stakes global transition.

highlights.title: TAM modeled to building-level detail
highlights.context: Built TAM and market intelligence datasets from executive rollups down to account/building-level detail, enabling territory/quota planning, whitespace analysis, and strategic partnership planning.
highlights.problem: Leadership needed a granular, data-driven way to size addressable market, plan territories/quotas, and identify whitespace.
highlights.approach: Built syndicated dataset from top-level rollups to account/building granularity; connected market signals with operational planning needs.
highlights.outcome: Enabled strategic insight into market penetration/whitespace and supported territory/quota planning and partnerships.

highlights.title: LLM workflows with evals & guardrails
highlights.context: Implemented advanced LLM workflows with prompt versioning, contextual memory/session layering, guardrails, evaluation checks, structured extraction, summarization, and human review.
highlights.roleTitle: Independent AI & Analytics Consultant / Product Development + Automation
highlights.problem: Recurring research, summarization, extraction, and reporting workflows required speed without losing quality.
highlights.approach: Built LLM workflows using prompt libraries, routing logic, contextual memory/session layering, eval checks, guardrails, and human review.
highlights.outcome: Improved consistency, reduced manual effort, sped up analysis/documentation, and created repeatable automation patterns.

highlights.title: Secure intake & document portal
highlights.context: Built secure client intake/document portal digitizing collection, review, lifecycle tracking, and status visibility; eliminated scanning/printing/sorting overhead and saved hundreds of administrative hours.
highlights.roleTitle: Independent AI & Analytics Consultant / Product Development + Automation
highlights.problem: Professional-services intake relied on manual scanning, printing, sorting, follow-ups, and opaque status tracking.
highlights.approach: Built secure client intake/document portal with lifecycle management, encrypted transfer, structured tracking, and status visibility.
highlights.outcome: Eliminated scanning/printing/sorting overhead, saved hundreds of admin hours, improved data integrity and auditability.

highlights.title: Supply-chain coordination reduction
highlights.context: Led supply-chain optimization analysis across procurement/fulfillment/manufacturing signals, improving planning visibility and reducing manual coordination by roughly 30-50%
highlights.problem: Procurement, manufacturing, and logistics signals were fragmented, limiting planning visibility and causing manual coordination overhead.
highlights.approach: Built automated reporting dataset and KPI framework, analyzed bottlenecks/cost drivers, and recommended process improvements.
highlights.outcome: Improved planning visibility and reduced manual coordination by ~30-50%

highlights.metric: millions in pipeline/won business; earnings-call references
highlights.title: Data products referenced in earnings calls
highlights.context: Built data products for competitive intelligence, TAM, data-driven prospecting, lead generation/conversion, territory planning, forecasting, and GTM funnel reporting; outputs generated millions in pipeline/won business and were referenced in earnings calls.
highlights.problem: Sales, strategy, and the executive team were each pulling competitive, market, and forecasting context from different places — slowing planning cycles and weakening external narratives.
highlights.approach: Built data products spanning competitive intelligence, TAM, data-driven prospecting, lead conversion, territory planning, forecasting, and GTM funnel reporting on Salesforce + Tableau, including a CRM migration to make the foundation durable.
highlights.outcome: Outputs generated millions in pipeline and won business and were referenced in earnings calls — the same datasets served front-line targeting and external storytelling.

experience.title: Independent AI & Analytics Consultant / Product Development + Automation
experience.description: Own end-to-end analytics, automation, and product-development engagements: discovery, requirements, solution design, build, QA, rollout, documentation, and iteration.

caseStudies.title: Global MSP Transition Tracking System
caseStudies.problem: Global partner-program revamp required reliable tracking of agreements, certification data, and transition progress across thousands of managed services partners.
caseStudies.actions: Integrated DocuSign, Salesforce, DWH, and certification data; defined KPI framework and accuracy criteria; built Tableau dashboards and automated cadence reports.
caseStudies.impact: Leadership could monitor adoption, risk, and completion for a high-stakes global transition.

caseStudies.title: ICP Redefinition and Retargeting Analytics
caseStudies.problem: Targeting needed a stronger evidence-backed Ideal Customer Profile across multiple segments.
caseStudies.actions: Combined CRM/ERP data, third-party firmographics, and qualitative signals from marketing, sales, product, and CS; defined segmentation and outreach guidance.
caseStudies.impact: Retargeting and outreach campaigns produced $5.5M+ net-new ARR improvement.

caseStudies.title: Manual Workflow Automation and Pipeline Refactor
caseStudies.problem: Manual workflows and an unreliable pipeline/bookings dataset consumed time and eroded trust.
caseStudies.actions: Automated manual processes, optimized data pipelines, refactored business logic, and improved usability/reliability for downstream reporting.
caseStudies.impact: Reclaimed 2,000+ off-clock hours and increased trust in core data assets.

caseStudies.title: TAM / Whitespace / Territory Planning Dataset
caseStudies.problem: Leadership needed a granular, data-driven way to size addressable market, plan territories/quotas, and identify whitespace.
caseStudies.actions: Built syndicated dataset from top-level rollups to account/building granularity; connected market signals with operational planning needs.
caseStudies.impact: Enabled strategic insight into market penetration/whitespace and supported territory/quota planning and partnerships.

caseStudies.title: Secure Client Intake and Document Portal
caseStudies.problem: Professional-services intake relied on manual scanning, printing, sorting, follow-ups, and opaque status tracking.
caseStudies.actions: Built secure client intake/document portal with lifecycle management, encrypted transfer, structured tracking, and status visibility.
caseStudies.impact: Eliminated scanning/printing/sorting overhead, saved hundreds of admin hours, improved data integrity and auditability.

caseStudies.title: Field Inspection Application and Customer Portal
caseStudies.problem: Field technicians relied on paper-based inspection workflows, creating data quality and throughput constraints.
caseStudies.actions: Mapped field workflows, designed mobile/low-code application, digitized data capture, and surfaced telemetry for tolerance regression, technician efficiency, and route optimization.
caseStudies.impact: Reduced paperwork to near zero, improved data accuracy, and increased jobs completed per technician per day.

caseStudies.title: AI-Orchestrated Insight Workflows
caseStudies.problem: Recurring research, summarization, extraction, and reporting workflows required speed without losing quality.
caseStudies.actions: Built LLM workflows using prompt libraries, routing logic, contextual memory/session layering, eval checks, guardrails, and human review.
caseStudies.impact: Improved consistency, reduced manual effort, sped up analysis/documentation, and created repeatable automation patterns.

caseStudies.title: Pricing & Packaging Profitability Analysis
caseStudies.problem: Pricing/packaging overhaul condensed hundreds of legacy SKUs into bundles while launching a new cloud-integrated product platform.
caseStudies.actions: Ran profitability analysis and partnered with operations/systems teams to ensure transition readiness, telemetry, and reporting.
caseStudies.impact: Supported strategic pricing/packaging decision-making and future-proofed reporting for product transition.

caseStudies.title: Supply Chain Visibility and Planning Analytics
caseStudies.problem: Procurement, manufacturing, and logistics signals were fragmented, limiting planning visibility and causing manual coordination overhead.
caseStudies.actions: Built automated reporting dataset and KPI framework, analyzed bottlenecks/cost drivers, and recommended process improvements.
caseStudies.impact: Improved planning visibility and reduced manual coordination by ~30-50%

caseStudies.title: Lead-to-Revenue Funnel and Attribution Foundation
caseStudies.problem: Campaign success and attribution needed a reliable lead-to-revenue data foundation.
caseStudies.actions: Built source methodology and collaborated across leadership, marketing, operations, data engineering, and sales.
caseStudies.impact: Improved GTM strategy and performance reporting for campaign attribution and funnel analysis.
